rewrite.rewritten: Qatar has announced the launch of a new event, with high attendance expected. The Ministry of Culture highlighted that the event is set to be one of the largest of the year, featuring a notable line-up.

Removed casual phrasing 'You won't believe how cool'
Changed 'launching' to 'announced the launch' for formality

rewrite.rewritten: Qatar Living announced the launch of a new platform that will transform the online shopping experience for consumers in Qatar.
changes_summary: Removed casual and hype language ('SUPER excited', 'game-changing', 'revolutionize', 'unprecedented', 'mind-blowing', 'must-see').
Replaced first-person with entity-first sentence ('Qatar Living announced').
Simplified claims to factual statements without exaggeration.

rewrite.rewritten: Qatar Airways has announced the resumption of flights to Helsinki and Tokyo, highlighting the airline's continued expansion of its global network.
changes_summary: Removed casual and opinionated language ('Crazy news', 'Insane move', 'Honestly obsessed', 'lol').
Added attribution to Qatar Airways for the announcement.
Replaced subjective enthusiasm with factual, institutional tone.
